allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Clean up repo structure and add campaign tools

- Remove nested AOE2GENAI-SCENARIOS-main folder \(flatten structure\)
- Add extract_campaign.py for extracting scenarios from .aoe2campaign files
- Update view_scenario.py to accept command-line arguments
- Add campaign files: Joan of Arc, Saladin, Genghis Khan
- Add campaign JSON metadata files
- Update CLAUDE.md with campaign tool documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add campaign-based scenario templates to generator

Analyzed 18 scenarios from Joan of Arc, Saladin, and Genghis Khan
campaigns to identify scenario types and trigger patterns.

New scenario types:
- escort: Hero escort/journey \(Joan 1, 5 pattern\)
- diplomacy: Multi-faction alliance building \(Genghis 1 pattern\)
- conquest: Progressive base capture \(Genghis 3 pattern\)
- defense: Wave-based survival \(Saladin 5 pattern\)
- battle: Direct army combat \(Saladin 6 pattern\)
- story: Narrative-driven with acts \(combined patterns\)

Each template includes:
- Detailed trigger structure \(Setup, Plot, Victory/Defeat, Objectives\)
- Player role assignments
- Map design guidance
- Key trigger mechanics from real campaigns

Updated example configurations to showcase all scenario types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
